# UX Checklist: Estimate Property Value Using Location Only

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage for location-only estimates.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/005-uc05-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all user-visible outcomes specified for success, fallback-warning success, normalization failure, and insufficient-data failure? [Completeness, Spec §Main Flow, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are UI requirements defined for the location-only indicator on every successful response? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are UI requirements defined for reduced-accuracy warning only when fallback data is used? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK004 Is the location-only indicator wording specified clearly enough for UI display? [Clarity, Spec §Non-Functional Requirements] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [x] CHK005 Are error messages specified clearly enough to distinguish normalization failure from insufficient-data failure? [Clarity, Spec §Non-Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do functional requirements and acceptance scenarios align on always showing the location-only indicator for success? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]
- [x] CHK007 Are fallback warning requirements consistent across alternate flows and acceptance scenarios? [Consistency, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK008 Are accessibility requirements defined for indicators and warnings in the UI? [Gap] Note: Necessary (constitution UX consistency); /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.
